nasb.text: even as the Father knows Me and I know the Father; and I lay down My life for the sheep.

esv.text: just as the Father knows me and I know the Father; and I lay down my life for the sheep.

cnv.text: 好像父認識我，我也認識父一樣；並且我為羊捨命。

ccb.text: 正如父认识我，我也认识父，并且我为羊舍命。

csbs.text: 就像父认识我，我也认识父那样，而且我为羊舍弃自己的生命。
